title: Non destructive evaluation with Terahertz FMCW radar
description:
122 GHz image of a composite sample (top) and honeycomb structured sample (bottom) with controlled inclusions from FP7 DOTNAC project using the an open-source scanning system at NA=0.5
Chopard, A., Fauquet, F., Goh, J. S., Pan, M., Mounaix, P., Guillet, J. P., ... & Smolyanskaya, O. (2021, May). Teragogic: Open source platform for low cost millimeter wave sensing and terahertz imaging. In 2021 IEEE Radar Conference (RadarConf21) (pp. 1-6). IEEE.
author: Jean-Paul Guillete
attribution_md:
